purpose: Out-of-band agent state that James knows but Agora can't see. Authoritative for Metis when Agora is degraded; reconciled against state.json's infra_status when both are present. Edit this file directly; Metis re-reads it every brief cycle.

redis_m1.since: 2026-05-17 evening (James restarted on M1 after returning home from vacation house)
redis_m1.note: Verified reachable from M4: TCP connect ~0ms, PING True. Dashboard reads Redis as primary; Postgres dual-write mirror is the per-agent fallback when an agent's Redis hash is silent.

postgres_m1.note: Hosts agora.agent_heartbeats (dual-write target for daemons), agora.intelligence_outputs (pronoia.py cycle log), agora.temp_secrets (credential staging), plus original agora.messages/decisions/open_questions tables.

M1_skullport.note: Both services back online after 2026-05-17 manual restart.

M2_spectrex5.intended_role: Apollo evolutionary engine + Harmonia scientist batches
M2_spectrex5.note: Powered up 2026-05-17 evening. Apollo running with Postgres dual-write instrumentation.

M4_aletheia.intended_role: Pronoia daemon + Nous + intelligence pipeline + Aletheia coordinator
M4_aletheia.note: intelligence_loop.py PID 13308 running continuously since 2026-05-17 15:43 EDT; --hourly-min 240 --email-every-cycle cadence (every 4 hours).

Hephaestus.forge_rate_context: The current ~4% forge rate is BY DESIGN, not a problem. The battery of validation tests was recently expanded to make passing harder — fewer noisy/weak tools get through. Low forge rate = stronger substrate quality, not 'critically low throughput'. Do NOT flag forge_rate < 10% as an Act item; report it as healthy substrate selection pressure (For the record at most).
open_concerns: double-logging cosmetic bug (third handler attached somewhere — non-critical)
Hephaestus.current_metrics_source: see state.json agents[].key_metrics for live ledger_size, session_forges, session_scraps, nous_queue_depth, etc.

Apollo.phase_at_revival: warmup → graduated (crossed gen 50 within ~2 minutes of launch)
Apollo.telemetry_state: Postgres dual-write only (agora_persist heartbeat thread every 60s); no Redis hash write
Apollo.current_metrics_source: see state.json agents[].key_metrics for live generation, phase, best_fitness_vector, gen_time_s, compilation_success_rate, etc.

Pronoia.cadence: every 4 hours: portfolio_monitor.py --once + metis_portfolio.py + push to main + send_brief_email.py

Nous.note: Instrumented but not running. Forge pipeline can run without it via historical responses.jsonl on M3.

Coeus.note: Last analysis predates current ledger. Re-running would update concept weights with 5K+ entry context.

active_pipelines: M3 Hephaestus forge — continuous substrate generation (Frame H tools)
M2 Apollo evolution — compositional organism search over Frame H gene library
M4 reporting/intelligence loop — 4-hour cycle producing portfolio briefs + emails + GitHub Pages updates + weekly recap (Friday auto)

Hephaestus: forge rate has improved or stayed low? Track ledger growth + session_forges/scraps ratio over time.
M1 Redis: 268K-key landscape data from Harmonia. Should it be archived/sharded?
